title: pteretis orientalis
intro: Pteretis orientalis, also known as Japanese angelica or Pteris orientalis, is a type of fern plant native to East Asia, particularly in China and Japan. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Pteretis orientalis include reducing fever, relieving rheumatism and arthritis, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Pteretis orientalis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
